reasoning.A:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: My puzzle is trivial (21 + 54 = 75), so I’m fully confident my own answer is correct. Across all previous games, every puzzle has been simple arithmetic, all answers have matched whenever verified, and no conflicting capsules have ever appeared—strong evidence that B, C, and D are also reliably correct. That makes the chance the combined password is wrong much smaller than the 1-in-4 risk of random death if, by bad luck, nobody volunteers. Verifying would only cost a coin and still leave random-death risk, while passing just hopes someone else steps up. Volunteering immediately with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D gives a very high probability everyone escapes this round.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: All prior games have used simple arithmetic, and every capsule answer has always been correct; the only death so far came from random elimination when no one volunteered. My own puzzle (50 − 23) is trivial, and there’s exactly one capsule per question with no conflicts, so the chance that this 4-part password is wrong is extremely small. Passing or verifying keeps the risk that everyone hesitates and we get another random death, while verifying also wastes a coin without adding meaningful safety. By volunteering now with each player’s own capsule, I guarantee there is at least one volunteer, avoid random elimination, and almost certainly escape with all 4 coins.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: All puzzles so far have been straightforward arithmetic, with no conflicting capsules and no wrong passwords once everyone’s initial answers were in. My own puzzle is trivial and I’m confident in my sealed answer, and it’s reasonable to expect the others are correct as in every prior game.  

Verifying now would cost 1 coin but only partially reduce risk (the other questions would still be unverified), and fully checking the others would be too expensive. Passing risks a random death if everyone waits. Given the track record and puzzle simplicity, the chance the full password is wrong is very low, so volunteering immediately with the only available capsules maximizes my expected survival while letting me keep all 4 coins if we escape.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.

rounds.outcome:
